briefdescription.para: Update global variables used by the Testpulse or DAQ.
Prepare test pulse/data acquisition.

parameterdescription.para: [optional: defaults to false] Fine tune data handling for single device (false) or multi device (true)

briefdescription.para: Return the number of selected checkboxes for the given type.
Returns the total number of combined channel types (DA, AD, and front TTLs) selected in the DA_Ephys Gui.

parameterdescription.para: acquisition mode, one of DATA_ACQUISITION_MODE or TEST_PULSE_MODE

briefdescription.para: Returns the ON/OFF status of the front TTLs on a specified rack.

parameterdescription.para: Only the ITC1600 can have two racks. For all other ITC devices RackNo = 0.

briefdescription.para: Returns the number of points in the longest stimset.

parameterdescription.para: acquisition mode, one of DATA_ACQUISITION_MODE or TEST_PULSE_MODE

briefdescription.para: Calculate the required length of the DAQDataWave.

detaileddescription.para:
ITC Hardware:
The DAQDataWave length = 2^x where is the first integer large enough to contain the longest output wave plus one. X also has a minimum value of 17 to ensure sufficient time for communication with the ITC device to prevent FIFO overflow or underrun.

parameterdescription.para: acquisition mode, one of DATA_ACQUISITION_MODE or TEST_PULSE_MODE

briefdescription.para: Create the DAQConfigWave used to configure the DAQ device.

parameterdescription.para: number of active channels as returned by DC_ChannelCalcForDAQConfigWave()

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable hardwareType, variable numActiveChannels, variable samplingInterval, variable dataAcqOrTP)
memberdef.name: DC_MakeAndGetDAQDataWave

briefdescription.para: Creates DAQDataWave; The wave that the device takes DA and TTL data from and passes AD data to for all channels.

detaileddescription.para: Config all refers to configuring all the channels at once

parameterdescription.para: number of active channels as returned by DC_ChannelCalcForDAQConfigWave()
sampling interval as returned by DAP_GetSampInt()

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable numRows, variable samplingInterval, variable index, variable type)
memberdef.name: DC_MakeNIChannelWave

briefdescription.para: Creates a single NIChannel wave.

detaileddescription.para: Config all refers to configuring all the channels at once

parameterdescription.para: numeric data type of NI channel

simplesect.para: Wave Reference to NI Channel wave

briefdescription.para: Initializes the waves used for displaying DAQ/TP results in the oscilloscope window and the scaled data wave.

memberdef.argsstring: (wave wv, variable numRows, variable sampleInterval, variable numDACs, variable numADCs, variable numTTLs, variable type=defaultValue, variable isFourierTransform=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: DC_InitDataHoldingWave

briefdescription.para: Initialize data holding waves to NaN.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable dataAcqOrTP, variable channelType, variable DAQChannelType=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: DC_GetFilteredChannelState

briefdescription.para: Return the list of active channels, filtered for various special cases.

parameterdescription.para: one of the channel type constants from ChannelTypeAndControlConstants
only return channels as active if they have the desired DAQChannel type (only respected for DA channel)

briefdescription.para: Places channel (DA, AD, and TTL) settings data into DAQConfigWave.
Get the decimation factor for the current channel configuration.

detaileddescription.para: This is the factor between the minimum sampling interval and the real. If the multiplier is taken into account depends on dataAcqOrTP.

briefdescription.para: Returns the longest sweep in a stimulus set across the given channel type.

simplesect.para: number of data points, not time

briefdescription.para: Get the stimset length for the real sampling interval.
Get the length for the real sampling interval from a generated wave with length.

parameterdescription.para: length of a generated data wave

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable numActiveChannels, variable dataAcqOrTP, variable multiDevice)
memberdef.name: DC_PlaceDataInDAQDataWave

briefdescription.para: Places data from appropriate DA and TTL stimulus set(s) into DAQDataWave. Also records certain DA_Ephys GUI settings into sweepDataLNB and sweepDataTxTLNB.

parameterdescription.para: number of active channels as returned by DC_ChannelCalcForDAQConfigWave()
Fine tune data handling for single device (false) or multi device (true)

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable numActiveChannels, variable dataAcqOrTP, variable multiDevice)
memberdef.name: DC_GetConfiguration

briefdescription.para: Document hardware type/name/serial number into the labnotebook.
Return the stimset acquisition cycle ID.

memberdef.argsstring: (variable raCycleID, string setName, variable setCycleCount, variable setChecksum, variable dataAcqOrTP)
memberdef.name: DC_GenerateStimsetFingerprint

briefdescription.para: Generate the stimset fingerprint.

detaileddescription.para:
This fingerprint is unique for the combination of the following properties:
Repeated acquisition cycle ID
stimset name
stimset checksum
set cycle count
Always then this fingerprint changes, a new stimset acquisition cycle ID has to be generated.

memberdef.definition: static std::tuple< variable, variable, variable > DC_CheckIfDataWaveHasBorderVals
memberdef.name: DC_CheckIfDataWaveHasBorderVals

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, string entry, variable headstage, variable channelNumber, variable channelType, variable var=defaultValue, string str=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: DC_DocumentChannelProperty

briefdescription.para: Document channel properties of DA and AD channels.

detaileddescription.para: Knows about unassociated channels and creates the special key returned by CreateLBNUnassocKey().

parameterdescription.para: number of headstage, must be NaN for unassociated channels

briefdescription.para: Combines the TTL stimulus sweeps across different TTL channels into a single wave.

parameterdescription.para: Front TTL rack aka number of ITC devices. Only the ITC1600 has two racks, see RackConstants. Rack number for all other devices is RACK_ZERO.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, string setName, variable channelNo, variable channelType)
memberdef.name: DC_CalculateChannelColumnNo

briefdescription.para: Returns column number/step of the stimulus set, independent of the times the set is being cycled through (as defined by SetVar_DataAcq_SetRepeats)

parameterdescription.para: channel type, one of CHANNEL_TYPE_DAC or CHANNEL_TYPE_TTL

xrefdescription.para: this code here is different compared to what RA_BckgTPwithCallToRACounterMD and RA_CounterMD do

briefdescription.para: Returns the length increase of the DAQDataWave following onset/termination delay insertion and distributed data aquisition. Does not incorporate adaptations for oodDAQ.

detaileddescription.para: All returned values are in number of points, not in time.

parameterdescription.para: [optional] onset delay set by the user
[optional] onset delay required by other settings

briefdescription.para: Calculate the stop collection point, includes all required global adjustments.
Returns 1 if a channel is set to TP, the check is through the stimset name from the GUI.
Get the channel type of given headstage.
DC Handle preparations before data acquisition or test pulse related to the DAQ data and config waves
